metadata.description: Prefix used for generated resource names.
Azure region for the Function App, DCR, and DCE.
Name of the Function App to create.
Name of the existing Log Analytics workspace used by Microsoft Sentinel.
Resource group containing the existing Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Data Collection Endpoint. Leave empty to use the default convention.
Name of the Data Collection Rule. Leave empty to use the default convention.

properties.streamDeclarations: [reduce(variables('dcrBatches')[copyIndex()], createObject(), lambda('state', 'dataset', union(lambdaVariables('state'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('dataset').dcrStreamName), createObject('columns', lambdaVariables('dataset').columns)))))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME', 'value', 'python'), createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'value', '~4'), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsFeatureFlags', 'value', 'EnableWorkerIndexing'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'PYTHON_ISOLATE_WORKER_DEPENDENCIES', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'DatasetConfigPath', 'value', 'Functions/datasets.json'), createObject('name', 'CollectorVersion', 'value', string(variables('datasetConfig').collectorVersion)), createObject('name', 'LogsIngestion__Endpoint', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/dataCollectionEndpoints', variables('dceName')), '2023-03-11').logsIngestion.endpoint), createObject('name', 'LogsIngestion__RuleId', 'value', if(greater(length(variables('datasets')), 0), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/dataCollectionRules', format('{0}-{1}', variables('dcrName'), padLeft(string(add(0, 1)), 2, '0'))), '2023-03-11').immutableId, '')), createObject('name', 'ManagedIdentity__ClientId', 'value', ''), createObject('name', 'Nist__ApiKey', 'value', '')), variables('datasetToggleSettings'), variables('scheduleAppSettings')), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appInsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName', 'value', format('stg{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName')))), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__credential', 'value', 'managedidentity'), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__blobServiceUri', 'value', format('https://{0}.blob.{1}', format('stg{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'))), environment().suffixes.storage)), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__queueServiceUri', 'value', format('https://{0}.queue.{1}', format('stg{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'))), environment().suffixes.storage)), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__tableServiceUri', 'value', format('https://{0}.table.{1}', format('stg{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'))), environment().suffixes.storage))))]

metadata.description: Name of the existing Log Analytics workspace used by Microsoft Sentinel.
Dataset definitions loaded from the shared dataset catalog.
